config.scxml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<scxml xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2005/07/scxml" xmlns:editor="http://vscxml.com/editor" version="1.0" datamodel="ecmascript" initial="operational" name="HamiltonSTAR_AutoLoad">
  <datamodel>
    <data id="carrier_type" expr="'none'"/>
    <data id="carrier_barcode" expr="''"/>
    <data id="carriers_on_deck" expr="0"/>
    <data id="tray_occupied" expr="false"/>
    <data id="last_error" expr="0"/>
  </datamodel>
  <state id="operational" initial="not_initialized" editor:x="12" editor:y="12" editor:width="1610" editor:height="372.02" editor:label="operational" editor:color="#1e2a3a" editor:zIndex="0">
    <state id="not_initialized" editor:x="680" editor:y="211.01999999999998" editor:width="225" editor:height="75" editor:label="not_initialized" editor:color="#2a2a3c" editor:zIndex="1">
      <transition target="idle_al" event="C0II" editor:waypoints="1025,261.02;1025,233.01999999999998" editor:id="t_01KP3PSQB72N1KQ1BGH8SYH9A3">
        <log expr="'Init AutoLoad'" label="FW"/>
      </transition>
    </state>
    <state id="idle_al" editor:x="1028" editor:y="165.01999999999998" editor:width="150" editor:height="75" editor:label="idle_al" editor:color="#2a2a3c" editor:zIndex="2">
      <transition target="identifying" event="C0CI" editor:waypoints="1205,224.01999999999998;1205,229.01999999999998" editor:id="t_01KP3PSQB74X321NYX2FF21VJ7">
        <log expr="'Identify carrier'" label="FW"/>
      </transition>
      <transition target="loading" event="C0CL" editor:waypoints="657,215.01999999999998;657,207.01999999999998;359,207.01999999999998;359,243.01999999999998" editor:labelRotation="-90" editor:id="t_01KP3PSQB7VT5826W45SK6ANQG">
        <log expr="'Load carrier'" label="FW"/>
      </transition>
      <transition target="unloading" event="C0CR" editor:waypoints="1225,205.01999999999998;1225,162.01999999999998;1344,162.01999999999998;1344,135.01999999999998" editor:id="t_01KP3PSQB8Q5YQ36704E15R16K">
        <log expr="'Unload carrier'" label="FW"/>
      </transition>
      <transition target="unloading" event="C0CW" editor:waypoints="1215,196.01999999999998;1215,130.01999999999998;1344,130.01999999999998;1344,117.02" editor:id="t_01KP3PSQB868K0JHHWBRYG17EJ">
        <log expr="'Unload finally'" label="FW"/>
      </transition>
      <transition target="idle_al" event="C0CT" editor:waypoints="1094.6666666666667,155.01999999999998;1111.3333333333333,155.01999999999998" editor:id="t_01KP3PSQB87CV04ZKWN61C9K01">
        <log expr="'Check presence'" label="FW"/>
      </transition>
      <transition target="idle_al" event="C0CS" editor:waypoints="1078,125.02;1128,125.02" editor:id="t_01KP3PSQB8A54GD8GMY1WH80RZ">
        <log expr="'Check tray'" label="FW"/>
      </transition>
      <transition target="idle_al" event="C0CP" editor:waypoints="1061.3333333333333,95.02;1144.6666666666667,95.02" editor:id="t_01KP3PSQB83VKWFE540RW2TJ5N">
        <log expr="'Set LEDs'" label="FW"/>
      </transition>
      <transition target="idle_al" event="C0CB" editor:waypoints="1044.6666666666667,65.02;1161.3333333333333,65.02" editor:id="t_01KP3PSQB8ETBWCCAQWZTSHTB7">
        <log expr="'Set barcode types'" label="FW"/>
      </transition>
      <transition target="monitoring" event="C0CU" editor:waypoints="1205,243.01999999999998;1205,329.02" editor:id="t_01KP3PSQB80P73Q80Z2SBZFN5M">
        <log expr="'Start monitoring'" label="FW"/>
      </transition>
    </state>
    <state id="identifying" editor:x="1380" editor:y="167.01999999999998" editor:width="200" editor:height="75" editor:label="identifying" editor:color="#2a2a3c" editor:zIndex="3">
      <transition target="idle_al" event="identify.done" editor:waypoints="1357,204.01999999999998;1357,215.01999999999998" editor:id="t_01KP3PSQB8TPJ0WD64XHZJAS7X">
        <assign location="carrier_type" expr="_event.data.type || 'unknown'"/>
        <assign location="carrier_barcode" expr="_event.data.barcode || ''"/>
      </transition>
    </state>
    <state id="loading" editor:x="30" editor:y="193.01999999999998" editor:width="150" editor:height="75" editor:label="loading" editor:color="#2a2a3c" editor:zIndex="4">
      <transition target="idle_al" event="load.done" editor:waypoints="349,224.01999999999998;349,196.01999999999998" editor:labelRotation="-90" editor:id="t_01KP3PSQB8P74G44PJE8VG6G0J">
        <assign location="carriers_on_deck" expr="carriers_on_deck + 1"/>
      </transition>
      <transition target="error_al" event="load.error" editor:id="t_01KP3PSQB88VZGPZ8E27B21P83">
        <assign location="last_error" expr="9"/>
      </transition>
    </state>
    <state id="unloading" editor:x="1367" editor:y="67.02" editor:width="175" editor:height="75" editor:label="unloading" editor:color="#2a2a3c" editor:zIndex="5">
      <transition target="idle_al" event="unload.done" editor:waypoints="1205,98.02;1205,186.01999999999998" editor:id="t_01KP3PSQB8N7RWYJS370XFF6ZJ">
        <assign location="carriers_on_deck" expr="Math.max(0, carriers_on_deck - 1)"/>
      </transition>
    </state>
    <state id="monitoring" editor:x="1364" editor:y="267.02" editor:width="175" editor:height="75" editor:label="monitoring" editor:color="#2a2a3c" editor:zIndex="6">
      <transition target="idle_al" event="monitor.done" editor:waypoints="1215,304.02;1215,233.01999999999998" editor:id="t_01KP3PSQB8HFRKE2MGMPN87KTA"/>
    </state>
    <state id="error_al" editor:x="362" editor:y="211.01999999999998" editor:width="175" editor:height="75" editor:label="error_al" editor:color="#2a2a3c" editor:zIndex="7">
      <onentry>
        <log expr="'AutoLoad error ' + last_error" label="ERROR"/>
      </onentry>
      <transition target="not_initialized" event="C0II" editor:id="t_01KP3PSQB8V94MF9RBAHXVWG90">
        <assign location="last_error" expr="0"/>
      </transition>
    </state>
  </state>
</scxml>
